why: Protocol 775 Play clientbound minecraft:block_update must dispatch from the official framed packet id to a ClientboundBlockUpdatePacket-compatible decoder through Stevenarella packet_by_id. This is packet-support evidence only and is separate from world/chunk state, block update semantics, initialized game state, spawn readiness, world load, render readiness, or client-load completion.
what: The Rust oracle test play_block_update_clientbound_framed_dispatch_matches_official_oracle_answer did not compile because Stevenarella had no Packet::PlayBlockUpdateClientbound variant for the official Play clientbound block_update surface. The current v26_1_2.rs Protocol 775 Play clientbound table maps minecraft:bundle_delimiter / 0x00 through minecraft:block_event / 0x07, but not minecraft:block_update / 0x08.

play_clientbound_block_update.official_fixture: official ClientboundBlockUpdatePacket BlockPos and built-in Blocks.STONE.defaultBlockState() constructor fixture; requires bootstrapped built-in block state registry but no initialized Level or game state
play_clientbound_block_update.official_body_shape: block position encoded with BlockPos.STREAM_CODEC and block state encoded with ByteBufCodecs.idMapper(Block.BLOCK_STATE_REGISTRY)

evidence.summary: Generated from official client.jar direct calls: ClientboundBlockUpdatePacket(BlockPos, BlockState), ClientboundBlockUpdatePacket.STREAM_CODEC, BlockPos.STREAM_CODEC, ByteBufCodecs.idMapper(Block.BLOCK_STATE_REGISTRY), Blocks.STONE.defaultBlockState(), Block.getId(BlockState), GameProtocols.CLIENTBOUND_TEMPLATE.details().listPackets(...), GameProtocols.CLIENTBOUND_TEMPLATE.bind(RegistryFriendlyByteBuf.decorator(RegistryAccess.EMPTY)).codec().encode/decode(...), and ClientGamePacketListener.handleBlockUpdate(ClientboundBlockUpdatePacket).
Manifest declares the exact Rust oracle test and framed_dispatch_decode comparison surface.
Rust test reads the manifest and answer, splits official framed VarInt packet id from body bytes, and calls packet::packet_by_id for Play clientbound block_update dispatch.
Current Protocol 775 Play clientbound mapping has official packet ids 0x00 bundle_delimiter through 0x07 block_event, but not official packet id 0x08 block_update.
Current Packet enum has no Play block_update packet variant matching the official 26.1.2 BlockPos and block-state VarInt body fixture.

observed_failure: error[E0599]: no variant or associated item named `PlayBlockUpdateClientbound` found for enum `Packet`
